response.justification: Exceptional match with 13+ years of full-stack experience directly on the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Demonstrates senior/staff-level architecture capabilities, AI agent infrastructure expertise, and proven ability to deliver at scale across multiple companies. Primary concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in experience and current 7-month career gap warrant clarification.
strengths: 13+ years direct experience with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) including production-scale systems at Optilyz (AWS CDK, MongoDB) and re:cinq (AI-agent infrastructure, MCP)
Proven senior/staff-level capabilities with multiple leadership roles, successful open-source projects (GISCollective platform), and demonstrated architecture/system design expertise
AI agent infrastructure and modern DevOps expertise (Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, CI/CD pipelines) align with engineering team's emerging needs
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite being the primary backend framework—would need to verify framework experience depth
Current 7-month career gap (Oct 2025–May 2026) without stated reason or active engagement
Testing framework expertise (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) implied through TDD methodology but not explicitly detailed in skills summary

key_factors.factor: AI agent infrastructure expertise & modern cloud/DevOps knowledge
Nest.js framework experience not explicitly mentioned
13+ years proven senior/staff-level full-stack experience on core technologies
